title: F048 — Love as Harmonic Coherence

requiredObjects: central symbolic heart or integration point

composition.camera: three-quarter orthographic or centered symbolic perspective
composition.layout: central topology with clean surrounding annotations
composition.colorLogic: spectrum or luminous gradient only when it clarifies geometry
composition.labelPolicy: labels optional; prefer clean geometry over text-heavy design

qaChecklist: Avoids forbidden objects and fake text
Does not overuse mystical or decorative elements

prompts.providerAgnostic:
Create a publication-quality scientific book figure titled "F048 — Love as Harmonic Coherence".
Purpose: Dissonant waves become coherent through listening, repair, relation, and love.

Manuscript context: Waves alternate between crest and trough. Breathing alternates between inhalation and exhalation. Life alternates between expansion and contraction. From a narrow perspective, positive and negative appear opposed. From a wider perspective, they are phases of one oscillation. Thus polarity is not necessarily ultimate separation. It may be phase distinction within deeper unity. F048 — Love as Harmonic CoherenceDissonant waves become coherent through listening, repair, relation, and love.F048-love-as-harmonic-coherence Toroidal Recursion The torus symbolizes circulation, return, and transformation. The basic symbolic movement is: [ 1 rightarrow Many rightarrow 1' ] The final unity is not identical to the first unity because it now contains conscious relationship.

Scientific/conceptual concepts: wave-particle relationship, quantum state transition, topological recursion, holographic/fractal structure, symbolic integration.
Required visual objects: wavefront or probability field, measurement boundary, toroidal geometry, nested or recursive field lines, central symbolic heart or integration point, spiral or healing path.
Recommended short labels: superposition, measurement, recursion, field, integration, recovery.

Composition: central topology with clean surrounding annotations.
Camera/view: three-quarter orthographic or centered symbolic perspective.
Visual hierarchy: primary manifold or geometry → recursive field lines → observer or axis if relevant → caption-level meaning implied by structure.
Color logic: spectrum or luminous gradient only when it clarifies geometry.
Label policy: labels optional; prefer clean geometry over text-heavy design.

Avoid: fake citations, fake equations, unreadable text, watermarks, copyrighted characters, random mystical clutter, misleading scientific labels, random galaxies unless explicitly required, decorative clutter.

Make it clean, serious, elegant, uncluttered, and suitable for an academic manuscript.
